description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a smooth, light brown frosting covering its entire surface. The cake is decorated with chocolate shavings around the base and several chocolate shards arranged on top. Two green-dotted number candles, '2' and '8', are placed upright on the cake, indicating a 28th birthday celebration. A white rectangular plaque with the message 'Happy Birthday Amanda' written in chocolate is positioned on top. The cake appears moist and dense, with a soft, creamy exterior and festive, celebratory decorations.
description: A round chocolate cake with light brown frosting, chocolate shavings, decorative shards, and birthday candles reading '28', topped with a celebratory plaque.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Happy Birthday Amanda' plaque, chocolate shards, and both number candles clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the chocolate shards and the side profile of the candles and plaque.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the number candles and the smooth, undecorated cake surface.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side of the plaque, the arrangement of chocolate shards, and the candles from a partial side perspective.
